artifact_summary: A SCADA system display showing two Modulating Valve Faceplates for Reactor Gate No.3, with one panel indicating an active Process Input Fault alarm.
artifact_blurb: The image presents a SCADA operator interface displaying dual Modulating Valve Faceplates associated with Reactor Gate No.3. The left panel enumerates standard operational parameters, while the right panel actively flags a 'Process Input Fault' alarm, indicating a deviation in the input signal for that specific valve control loop.
